title: atriplex patula subsp. erecta
intro: Atriplex patula subsp. erecta, also known as upright orache, is a subspecies of the Atriplex patula plant, belonging to the Amaranthaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The health benefits of upright orache include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures that can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
